title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Swiggy Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Swiggy Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
